name: rom-weaver-packages
description: npm workspace root for the rom-weaver browser packages (@rom-weaver/wasm + @rom-weaver/webapp). Not published.
//vite: Keep this vite pin identical to packages/rom-weaver-webapp/package.json. The `$vite` override below resolves to this workspace-root pin, and the workspace shares a single vite; a mismatch would install two copies and break the override reference.
